creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
One of the most hyped restaurants in Copenhagen in 2024 ✨

📍Lee’s Kitchen in Frederiksberg/Nørrebro. The nearest metro station is Forum Station, 2 mins from the restaurant. 

I’m a massive fan of crispy duck and this is one of the best I’ve had in Copenhagen 🤝 

If you’re looking for a no thrills Asian restaurant in Copenhagen, this is a pretty save bet. 

Check out my Youtube channel for more Copenhagen recommendations 🇩🇰

#copenhagen #copenhagenfood #thingstodoincopenhagen

geo_locations: Lee’s Kitchen in Frederiksberg/Nørrebro. The nearest metro station is Forum Station, 2 mins from the restaurant.
pinned_places: Lee’s Kitchen in Frederiksberg/Nørrebro. The nearest metro station is Forum Station, 2 mins from the restaurant.

transcription.text: Day 69 of trying viral restaurants in Copenhagen. Lee's Kitchen doesn't look like much from the outside, and to be honest, it's not the prettiest place on the inside either. But the staff here are super friendly, and I kind of like that you're just putting in your order and paying at the counter. And bloody hell, this truly is fast food. Our crispy dog arrived like two minutes after we ordered. We also got some wontons with shrimp and pork that I think were a solid 10 out of 10. The crispy dog wasn't that crispy to be honest, but it tasted very nice anyways. I also overheard a couple of other customers speaking Chinese with the staff. So if you're looking for proper Chinese restaurants in Copenhagen, then I think this is where to go.
